Member Function Documentation

◆ prepare() [1/2]

virtual ARCANE_DEPRECATED void IDiscreteOperator::prepare ( const FaceGroup &  internal_faces,
const FaceGroup &  boundary_faces,
FaceGroup &  c_internal_faces,
FaceGroup &  cf_internal_faces,
CoefficientArrayT< Cell > *  cell_coefficients,
CoefficientArrayT< Face > *  face_coefficients 
)
pure virtual

Preliminary computations (including connectivity).

Parameters
internal_facesinternal faces
boundary_facesboundary faces, whose flux stencil contains both cell and (boundary) face unknowns and which require a boundary condition value to be added to the right-hand side
c_internal_facesthe group of internal faces whose flux stencil contains cell unknowns only
cf_internal_facesthe group of internal faces whose flux stencil contains both cell and (boundary) face unknowns
cell_coefficientsdata structure containing cell stencils and coefficients
face_coefficientsdata structure containing face stencils and coefficients

Implemented in IDivKGradOLGSchemes< TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder, TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder >, StandardDivKGradTwoPointsService, StandardDivKGradTwoPointsActiveService, DivKGradTwoPointsService, and DivKGradGradMScheme< TCellStencilBuilder, TFaceStencilBuilder, TCellCoefficientArrayBuilder, TFaceCoefficientArrayBuilder >.

mesha pointer to IMesh
cell_coefficientsdata structure containing cell stencils and coefficients
face_coefficientsdata structure containing face stencils and coefficients
